message:
feat(spotify): add playback control, library management, and playlist CRUD

Add 23 new operations across 3 feature sets:
- Playback control (11): get_state, devices, play, pause, skip, seek, volume,
  shuffle, repeat, transfer
- Library management (7): tracks list/save/remove/check, albums list/save/remove
- Playlist CRUD (5): create, update, tracks list/add/remove

Spotify connector now has 33 operations total. All 283 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -512,6 +512,886 @@ common_mistakes = ["No active playback device."]
 examples = ["{}"]
